name: Firestone – Idle Clicker Online RPG
short_description: Chill out, your heroes got this! They’ll fight even when you’re offline. Pop back in for satisfying numbers going up, sweet rewards and easy level-ups. Unlock cool gear, & smack down epic bosses. Play idle or clicker - you’ll power up with no stress, just good times and infinite progression!
detailed_description:
Firestone: A casual idle game that plays itself (mostly)

You know the feeling. You want to play something, but not learn a whole new system, grind endlessly, or fight 8-year-olds on a leaderboard. You just want a game that’s fun, satisfying, and doesn’t come with a 40-minute tutorial.

Firestone is a laid-back, casual idle game and hero collector where you build a team and progress automatically. Even while you’re doing something else. No pressure. Just progress, loot, and occasionally see dragons. Perfect for fans of idle, AFK, and incremental games.

🧙‍♂️ Build a team, then let them do their thing (AFK Progress!)

Your squad fights automatically. Spells fly, swords swing, enemies explode - all while you sip your coffee. Log in, collect rewards, level up your heroes, maybe swap in a better wizard. Then get on with your day. Progress never stops - even when you’re AFK.

🧚 A World That Doesn’t Ask Much of You

From frozen peaks to pirate hideouts, the world of Alandria is packed with fancy graphics. No lore dumps, no confusing side quests. Just a colorful map that you unlock as your team grows. Set some timers and come back to claim rewards - no grind required.

💡 Always Something to Unlock

Cool heroes, shiny gear, and cute pets - Firestone has plenty to collect. But it’s never overwhelming. New systems unlock gradually, and upgrades come at a satisfying rhythm. Collect, upgrade, and evolve your squad at your own pace - whether you’re an idler, a clicker, or both.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Stay Solo or Join the Crowd

Join a guild for some extra rewards and light chat. Or skip it entirely. Firestone’s multiplayer is as chill as the game itself, with no pressure to keep up or compete.

Perfect For:

• People who play while watching something else

• Casual players who want low-effort progress

• Anyone who’s ever said “one more level” at midnight

• Players who miss when games were just… fun

• Fans of idle, clicker, incremental, or AFK games

For players searching for: idle games, AFK RPG, idle RPG, incremental RPG, clicker games, clicker RPG, auto battler RPG, hero collector games, hero collector RPG, AFK games, AFK battler, AFK grind game, passive RPG, casual RPG, chill RPG, fantasy idle RPG, fantasy incremental game, offline idle games, idle team builder, idle combat game, idle fantasy game, idle hero upgrade game, resource idle game, time-friendly RPG, long-term progression game, guild idle game, browser idle RPG, mobile idle RPG, relaxing progression game, zero-pressure RPG, low-effort idle game, casual progression game, auto-battle RPG, AFK team RPG, incremental battler, idle strategy game.

Firestone doesn’t want your whole weekend. Just a few good minutes - and progress while you’re away. Boot it up, collect your loot, and let your heroes handle the rest.

Join the community on Discord.
